{# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2025 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved. SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0 Navbar includes this as "version-switcher" (see nvidia_sphinx_theme theme.conf navbar_center). data-bs-popper="static" keeps the menu under the toggle instead of floating over content. #} {% if theme_switcher %} {# Displays a dropdown box for switching among different versions of your documentation. #} {%- set button_id = unique_html_id("pst-version-switcher-button") -%} {%- set dropdown_id = unique_html_id("pst-version-switcher-list") -%} {# As the version switcher will only work when JavaScript is enabled, we hide it with pst-js-only #}
{% endif %}
